content: Is it just maxed titan blade you grind for first or is there nuance to wods
I'd say for the first one Titan's blade is definitely much better than others, it's just a very good DPS generalist wheel
some DPS will want more specific things sometimes, but they all can use Titan until then, and even after you get better stuff you'll still use Titan on someone in D-tide
There is absolutely nuance. Titans blade is probably the only one where its so generally useful on some many dps characters it makes sense to pick up first.
Understood guys. So even if im on +6 blade its still better to finish it first before getting any other wheels?
Everything past titans is much more team based and specific.
Loud and clear
You will get other wheels randomly taking titans from 6 to 12.
You might even get lucky and pick up some former limited stuff.

well it can be fine grabbing an E0 wheel you need for another char first, like I got an alva wheel for Kath before I finished Titan because it's just one wheel, just not worth trying to grab a bunch or leveling them to E3 until you're done with titan imo

Thais is still running I think? Getting her+her wheel should be the highest priority, she wants E2 and wheel at E3 but even just getting them at E0 so you can use dupes later is fine too since you won't have that many pulls early. Mouchette is ok as a DPS but she's useable for early story with just E0 that you get for free, so I'd just wait until the banner is about to expire to figure out what you're doing for that
really depends on what you want to do or use, castor can be used as a DPS at E3 though so that's a big step, while Thais can be used before E2 mostly fine
well Thais E2 is best when she's used outside gHelot comps since the -1 arith matters more there
provided you're not copying a 1 cost card
if you have her at E0, E1 is also quite good
yeah for gMurphy I'd say it's worth it since waltz is a high cost
Castor advantage is you can kinda run him on his own for dtide
just with like E1 Jenkins to proc corrosion
and 2 fillers
obviously at alert 5 you'll need more work in that comp but for alert 3 and even 4 that's enough
dtide is the endgame mode
where you need 5 teams
Castor at E3 there can be played with a bunch of fillers, which is always good since 5 teams is a lot

the way he works is he puts a debuff on enemies and he can't detonate it himself, but another char can detonate it for a lot of dmg, that's why you usually pair him with Jenkins(standard so easy to get)
he's also nice to put in other teams but if you're already playing thais gmurphy then can't use him there
anyway maybe see if you can get some pulls to get Thais copies directly from the banner, although might want to keep some for Myriam too
that's enough if you don't have a lot of spare pulls
it's very good to have it at E3 since it's arguably the best hand size wheel, but you can do that with free dupes over time, hell you can randomly get it from standard wheel pulls too if lucky
and the main thing you want is the handsize so E0 is enough
just depends on what you want there's no perfect choice after that it's personnal preference/depends on what you need

good wheels are Unyielding(mostly for Kath), Incalc(for exalt spammers with aliemus gen like myriam, maybe thais, winkle), Downpour(largely for Castor but good as a filler on a bunch of chars since free strikes+dmg amp is nice) and then the chains/rat ones for DPS depending on the ones you have/want
I wouldn't bother with Caecus wheel, you can get like E0-E3 if you want but no reason to +12 it

what does exhaust and retain do btw
ah i sea

Exhaust - Removes the Card from Play Permanently (only effective for the current Battle), so it's generally not recommended to use it on Cards that you want to be playing often

Retain - Keeps the Card in Hand at the end of your Turn instead of immediately discarding it, so it's generally recommended to use it on Cards that you want to be saving for later use
ah i see, thanks for explaining
Yh np man
is there a pity system btw?

Yeah it's 30 for a Guaranteed SSR, but there is a slight difference between Awakeners to WoDs

Awakener (Rate Up) - Guaranteed in 90 Draws / 3rd SSR Pull
WoD (Rate Up) - Guaranteed in 60 Draws / 2nd SSR Pull

Castor can be used as a Shielder immediately from E0 and a Sub DPS at E3 (but is fine before then, just not as consistent) and is often paired with Jenkins (who you'll be using as the main DPS, only get her E1 though)
i wanna try aim for ghelot so would it change my decision?
Clementine is another Strong Pick who is serviceable at E0 as she has very high Strength Scaling & Keyflare Generation
(and can be used as a Support for GHelot)
Yes, Clem works for that if you'd like
If you're unsure, Castor or Clementine is generally the best pick. If you want to invest in a unit, Kathi at E3 is one of the best units in the game.
Corposant works too towards at an earlier investment (E2) and can work just fine when played together with Aurita, Cassiah and Erica
Pollux is also a nice DPS to use, but he'll generally want to have E3 just like with Kath

If you mean when they reset, yes, they reset at the same time.
